title: dendrobium angulatum
intro: Dendrobium angulatum, also known as the angled dendrobium, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Dendrobium angulatum is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
